---
title: "Lecture 1: Course Logistics, R, Markdown"
date: 2025-06-24
summary: "Course Logistics, R, Markdown"
url_slides: 01-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinasab/csp-materials/01-r-markdown
format: html
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Info and Materials

* **Date**: {{< meta date >}}
* **Topics**: {{< meta summary >}}
* **Slides**: [View Slides]({{< meta url_slides >}})
* **Code**: `usethis::use_course("{{< meta url_code >}}")`


## Learning Objectives

- Recognize the basic features of the R programming language and RStudio
- Write and run simple R code
- Describe what R Markdown is and why it's useful
- Create and edit a R Markdown document


## Before Class

- Complete the [pre-course survey]()
- Create a GitHub account and [submit your username]()
- Bring to class a laptop (every class)!


## Readings

Skim the readings before or after class to get the big picture and prep for quizzes or assignments:

- [R Markdown, R4DS](https://r4ds.had.co.nz/r-markdown.html)
- [R Markdown Cheatsheet](https://www.rstudio.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/02/rmarkdown-cheatsheet.pdf)
